arts.ttl: Inter and Barcelona equal Champions League record in all-time classic semi-final
arts.sum: Inter Milan and Barcelona have just played out one of the all-time greatest Champions League games in this season’s semi-final. The two teams went blow for blow in breathless fashion for two whole games and then some, with extra time needed to decide a winner.
